/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/cursor_clone.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cursor_clone.dir/groq_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cursor_clone.dir/text_editor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cursor_clone.dir/cursor_clone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cursor_clone.dir/pinecone_client.cpp.o -o cursor_clone  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so libimgui.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
